SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution

Class ExecutionNodeReader

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.ExecutionNodeReader
public class ExecutionNodeReader extends Object
Allows to read XML files which contains an symbolic execution tree written via an ExecutionNodeWriter.
See Also:
  • ExecutionNodeWriter

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static class 
    ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessBaseExecutionNode<S extends SourceElement>
    An implementation of IExecutionBaseMethodReturn which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.
    static class 
    ExecutionNodeReader.AbstractKeYlessExecutionBlockStartNode<S extends SourceElement>
    An abstract implementation of IExecutionBlockStartNode which is independent from KeY and provides such only children and default attributes.

    • ExecutionNodeReader

      public ExecutionNodeReader()

  • Method Details

    • read

      public IExecutionNode<?> read(File file) throws ParserConfigurationException, SAXException, IOException
      Reads the given File.
      Parameters:
      file - The File to read.
      Returns:
      The root of the read symbolic execution tree.
      Throws:
      ParserConfigurationException - Occurred Exception.
      SAXException - Occurred Exception.
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • read

      public IExecutionNode<?> read(InputStream in) throws ParserConfigurationException, SAXException, IOException
      Reads from the given InputStream and closes it.
      Parameters:
      in - The InputStream to read from.
      Returns:
      The root of the read symbolic execution tree.
      Throws:
      ParserConfigurationException - Occurred Exception.
      SAXException - Occurred Exception.
      IOException - Occurred Exception.

    • findNode

      protected IExecutionNode<?> findNode(IExecutionNode<?> root, String path) throws SAXException
      Searches the IExecutionNode starting at the given root which is defined by the path.
      Parameters:
      root - The IExecutionNode to start search.
      path - The path.
      Returns:
      The found IExecutionNode.
      Throws:
      SAXException - If it was not possible to find the node.

    • isConstraint

      protected boolean isConstraint(String uri, String localName, String qName)
      Checks if the currently parsed tag represents an IExecutionConstraint.
      Parameters:
      uri - The URI.
      localName - THe local name.
      qName - The qName.
      Returns:
      true represents an IExecutionConstraint, false is something else.

    • isVariable

      protected boolean isVariable(String uri, String localName, String qName)
      Checks if the currently parsed tag represents an IExecutionVariable.
      Parameters:
      uri - The URI.
      localName - THe local name.
      qName - The qName.
      Returns:
      true represents an IExecutionVariable, false is something else.

      Parameters:

      qName - The qName.
      Returns:
      true represents an IExecutionVariable, false is something else.

      protected boolean isCallStackEntry(String uri, String localName, String qName)
      Checks if the currently parsed tag represents an entry of IExecutionNode.getCallStack().
      Parameters:
      uri - The URI.
      localName - THe local name.
      qName - The qName.
      Returns:
      true represents call stack entry, false is something else.

    • isMethodReturnEntry

      protected boolean isMethodReturnEntry(String uri, String localName, String qName)
      Checks if the currently parsed tag represents an entry of IExecutionMethodCall.getMethodReturns().
      Parameters:
      uri - The URI.
      localName - THe local name.
      qName - The qName.
      Returns:
      true represents method return entry, false is something else.

      protected boolean isCompletedBlockEntry(String uri, String localName, String qName)
      Checks if the currently parsed tag represents an entry of IExecutionNode.getCompletedBlocks().
      Parameters:
      uri - The URI.
      localName - THe local name.
      qName - The qName.
      Returns:
      true represents completed block entry, false is something else.

      protected boolean isOutgoingLink(String uri, String localName, String qName)
      Checks if the currently parsed tag represents an entry of IExecutionNode.getOutgoingLinks().
      Parameters:
      uri - The URI.
      localName - THe local name.
      qName - The qName.
      Returns:
      true represents block completion entry, false is something else.

      protected boolean isBlockCompletionEntry(String uri, String localName, String qName)
      Checks if the currently parsed tag represents an entry of IExecutionBlockStartNode.getBlockCompletions().

      localName - THe local name.
      qName - The qName.
      Returns:

      uri - The URI.
      localName - THe local name.
      qName - The qName.
      Returns:
      true represents termination entry, false is something else.

      protected ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessVariable createVariable(IExecutionValue parentValue, String uri, String localName, String qName, Attributes attributes)

      Parameters:
      parentValue - The parent IExecutionValue.
      uri - The URI.
      localName - THe local name.
      qName - The qName.
      attributes - The attributes.

      qName - The qName.
      attributes - The attributes.
